title: salvia officinalis subsp. officinalis
intro: Salvia officinalis subsp. officinalis, commonly known as garden sage, is a subspecies of the Salvia officinalis plant, a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Salvia officinalis subsp. officinalis include reducing inflammation and improving cognitive function, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and sore throats. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and dried leaves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
